description_long: This is a modern, four-seat chaise with a boxy, modular design and a smooth, matte finish. The chaise features a low, straight backrest and armrests on both ends, creating a symmetrical and balanced appearance. Each seat section is distinctly separated, with subtle seams visible between the cushions, giving the piece a segmented look. The upholstery appears to be a solid, dark gray material, likely faux leather or vinyl, with a slightly padded surface for comfort. The base of the chaise is flush with the ground, with no visible legs or elevation, contributing to its contemporary, grounded aesthetic. The overall form is clean, minimalistic, and well-suited for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor plazas.
description: A modern, four-seat chaise with a boxy, modular design, smooth dark gray upholstery, and armrests on both ends. The piece is low to the ground with a segmented, minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing four distinct seat sections, low backrest, and armrests on both ends.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise's length, low profile, and the thickness of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight, continuous backrest and the segmentation between seat sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the other armrest and the chaise's elongated form.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is low, straight, and runs the full length of the chaise, with a uniform height and no visible curvature or decorative elements. It is segmented in alignment with the seat cushions, giving a modular appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both the left and right ends, matching the height and thickness of the backrest, and are rectangular in shape.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base of the chaise sits flush with the ground, suggesting a platform or plinth-style construction.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark gray with a smooth, matte finish and subtle seam lines between each seat section. There is no visible tufting, quilting, or decorative pattern.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are four attached seat cushions, each corresponding to a seating section, with matching backrest segments. The cushions are evenly spaced and integrated into the overall structure, with no loose or layered cushions visible.
